title: D & A 3D Mace
description: Mace in 2D LOOKS SOOO BORING BUT there are people making texture pack for them BUT It looks like an breeze rod with an heavy core no hammer looks SO THATS SOOOOOO BORING BUT This Texture packs has An Hammer Mace!
body:
🔨 3D Mace Pack – Vanilla-Style Weapon Rework

Add some heavy-hitting style to your world with this 3D Mace texture pack! Replaces standard weapons (or a custom item) with a detailed, fully 3D-modeled mace. Perfect for medieval, fantasy, or PvP-themed gameplay.

🛠️ Optimized for performance

🎮 Works with most versions and servers

🔧 Fully vanilla-compatible (no mods required)

💥 Great for PvP, adventure maps, or roleplay!

Whether you're smashing mobs or clashing in the arena, this mace brings the brutal vibes.


# On Every Version(1.21+)!

We will support every minecraft version till the END!

# Why did we made this?

Mace in 2D LOOKS SOOO BORING BUT there are people making texture pack for them BUT It looks like an breeze rod with an heavy core no hammer looks SO THATS SOOOOOO BORING BUT This Texture packs has An Hammer Mace!

Feeling lag try using D & A Optimized TODAY!
